scripts.test: corepack pnpm exec tsx --test src/lib/chat/agentCityProjection.test.ts src/lib/chat/agentCityScene.test.ts src/lib/settings/memoryCenter.test.ts src/lib/native/commandSystem.test.ts src/lib/native/startupCoordinator.test.ts src/lib/native/directManipulation.test.ts src/lib/native/commandPalette.test.ts src/lib/native/windowState.test.ts src/lib/native/feedbackCoordinator.test.ts src/lib/native/hapticCoordinator.test.ts && node --test src/chat-ui.test.mjs src/http-scope.test.mjs src/reactive-statement-guard.test.mjs && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.tauri:build: corepack pnpm run sync:version && corepack pnpm run prepare:runtime && node ../../scripts/build-desktop-tauri.mjs && node ../../scripts/finalize-desktop-release.mjs
